channel.title: time_wait on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in time_wait on IT notes

item.title: Time wait
item.description: Reduce TIME_WAIT connections How many TIME_WAITs you have hanging out (run this like root): netstat -na -p tcp | awk '{print $6}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -n On Linux: netstat -nat | awk '{print $6}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -n Output will be something like: # netstat -na -p tcp | awk '{print $6}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -n 1 1 Foreign 1 LAST_ACK 1 been 3 LISTEN 25 SYN_RCVD 1455 CLOSE_WAIT 17518 ESTABLISHED The formula to calculate the value (net.
